title: pyrrosia gardneri
intro: Pyrrosia gardneri, also known as the Chinese Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Pyrrosia gardneri are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
